answers.answer: D) The customer is charged but the system has no record - the charge is orphaned. Reason: When the worker crashes after calling Stripe API (step 3) but before writing to database (step 4), Stripe has already processed the charge, but the result is never persisted. The message queue will not replay the message (already consumed), and the web server polling will timeout or find no record. This creates an orphaned charge requiring manual reconciliation.

Claim 1 (code reviews slow shipping): Causation NOT established. Confounders: other process changes, team size, project complexity. Reverse causation: complex projects may require stricter reviews. Need: A/B testing with controlled complexity. Claim 2 (tests prevent incidents): Causation NOT fully established. Confounders: teams with more tests may have better overall engineering practices. Need: randomized controlled trials. Claim 3 (Kubernetes more expensive): Causation partially成立 but confounded. Confounders: business growth, resource usage increase, K8s misconfiguration. Need: cost comparison with same workload, resource utilization analysis. Claim 4 (Copilot increases productivity): Causation NOT established. Confounders: Copilot users may be more experienced/motivated; PR count does not equal productivity (could be small changes). Need: code quality metrics, feature completion time, randomized Copilot access experiment.
